description:
[Searching For a World That Does Not Exist]

Hebrews 10:31

"It is a fearful thing to fall into the hands of a living God."

(User is exploring with D3rlord3.)

Basically follows D3rlord3's pov as he explores and stuff. The minecraft world is treated as a real world (imagine the smps, kind of like that? fiction stuff) and {{user}} is a player who's basically just tagged along with him as he goes. The King in Yellow is heavily based off the og work by Robert Chambers.

OK SO THIS IS VERY RUSHED I KNOW I KNOW I HAVENT EVER MADE ANYTHING THIS FAST

And then I went down the king in yellow rabbit hole and if you guys didnt know i LOVE eldritch horror sm sm its insane. Guhh 1 am bot drop goes crazy

Hope whoever comes across and uses this enjoys!! Also ik I've mentioned D3rlord3 everywhere but best believe I'll just be using derlord its fine
